name: Olive Garden Breadsticks
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp dried oregano leaf (rub to a powder between fingers)
recipeInstructions:
1. When the dough is soft enough to knead, spray your fingers with Pam or oil.
2. Knead the dough just until you can shape it into cigar-sized pieces (about 8-10).
3. Place the pieces about 3 inches apart on Pam-sprayed cookie sheets.
4. Let rise in a warm place until doubled in size, about 1-1/2 hours.
5. Hold Pam about 8 inches from the sticks and lightly spray the top of each.
6. Dust with garlic powder and oregano.
7. Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Cool on a rack and serve within a day or two.
